name: medicaid_sdud_2026
audience: state Medicaid program managers + CMS analysts

deterministic.name: dax_syntax
deterministic.what: Static DAX parse + column / function existence

deterministic.name: model_design
deterministic.what: Star schema · single-direction filters · marked date table

deterministic.name: pii_leak
deterministic.what: MRN / SSN / DOB / phone / email pattern hunt

deterministic.name: accessibility
deterministic.what: WCAG AA contrast + non-placeholder visual titles

deterministic.name: governance
deterministic.what: RLS roles present · data sources annotated

llm.name: business_narrative
llm.what: Executive caption quality · headline → trend → outlook

llm.name: visualization_choice
llm.what: Chart type fit · no pie>5cats · no 3D · no twin-axis-on-different-scales

llm.name: forecast_method
llm.what: Method named · MAPE shown · confidence band shown · native PBI forecast not used

llm.name: dax_review
llm.what: VAR/RETURN · DIVIDE · time-intel on marked date table · KEEPFILTERS

llm.name: domain_relevance
llm.what: Healthcare vocab present: NDC HCPCS ICD-10 HEDIS PMPM T-MSIS CMS

auditors.name: dax_auditor
auditors.what: Re-checks dax_syntax + dax_perf in surrounding context (CONFIRM / DISMISS / ESCALATE)

auditors.name: model_auditor
auditors.what: Re-checks model_design + governance findings against the .bim

auditors.name: narrative_auditor
auditors.what: Cross-references narrative numbers against measures · catches hallucinations
